heading: Prohibition on sale, importation, or exportation of products labeled or advertised as rhinoceros or tiger products
label: 5305a Prohibition on sale, importation, or exportation of products labeled or advertised as rhinoceros or tiger products

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: a Prohibition
children.text: A person shall not sell, import, or export, or attempt to sell, import, or export, any product, item, or substance intended for human consumption or application containing, or labeled or advertised as containing, any substance derived from any species of rhinoceros or tiger.

children.heading: Criminal penalty
children.label: 1 Criminal penalty
children.text: A person engaged in business as an importer, exporter, or distributor that knowingly violates subsection (a) shall be fined under title 18, imprisoned not more than 6 months, or both.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: A person that knowingly violates subsection (a), and a person engaged in business as an importer, exporter, or distributor that violates subsection (a), may be assessed a civil penalty by the Secretary of not more than $12,000 for each violation.

children.heading: Manner of assessment and collection
children.label: B Manner of assessment and collection
children.text: A civil penalty under this paragraph shall be assessed, and may be collected, in the manner in which a civil penalty under the Endangered Species Act of 1973 [ et seq.] may be assessed and collected under section 11(a) of that Act ().16 U.S.C. 153116 U.S.C. 1540(a)

children.heading: Products, items, and substances
children.label: c Products, items, and substances
children.text: Any product, item, or substance sold, imported, or exported, or attempted to be sold, imported, or exported, in violation of this section or any regulation issued under this section shall be subject to seizure and forfeiture to the United States.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: d Regulations
children.text: After consultation with the Secretary of the Treasury, the Secretary of Health and Human Services, and the United States Trade Representative, the Secretary shall issue such regulations as are appropriate to carry out this section.

children.heading: Enforcement
children.label: e Enforcement
children.text: The Secretary, the Secretary of the Treasury, and the Secretary of the department in which the Coast Guard is operating shall enforce this section in the manner in which the Secretaries carry out enforcement activities under section 11(e) of the Endangered Species Act of 1973 ().16 U.S.C. 1540(e)

children.heading: Use of penalty amounts
children.label: f Use of penalty amounts
children.text: Amounts received as penalties, fines, or forfeiture of property under this section shall be used in accordance with .section 3375(d) of this title
